nasb.text: so that He might sanctify her, having cleansed her by the washing of water with the word,

esv.text: that he might sanctify her, having cleansed her by the washing of water with the word,

cnv.text: 為的是要用水藉著道把教會洗淨，成為聖潔，

ccb.text: 好借着自己的道用水洗净教会，使她圣洁，

csbs.text: 基督这么做，是要藉着话语，用水的洗涤而洁净教会，使她分别为圣，
